chapter_title.ar: باب التَّسْلِيمِ عَلَى الْمُصَلِّي وَ الْعُطَاسِ فِي الصَّلَاةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 46 – The greetings upon the praying one, and the sneezing during the Salāt

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/241)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/241)
text: إِذَا عَطَسَ الرَّجُلُ فِي صَلَاتِهِ فَلْيَحْمَدِ اللَّهَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘When the man sneezes during his Salāt, so let him Praise Allahazwj’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘In case of sneezing in Salah (prayer) one should say, ‘Tahmid, (all praise belongs to Allah).”
